title: Ender Stranding
description: Ender Stranding is a resource pack inspired by Death Stranding, aiming to capture its unique atmosphere.
body:
Resourcepack designed to transfer the atmosphere of the game death stranding in the minecraft world

[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) is required!

The resourcepack is in the early stages of development, if you have ideas please contact author. I'm most active on reddit, but you can suggest what platform to use instead, I'm happy to hear any ideas :D
